description: Future standalone Cusco trekking catalog. Prepared for All Experiences, product pages and filters, without mixing with dynamic packages.

products.title: Camino Inca 2D/1N
products.shortDescription: Short Inca Trail version that connects trekking, history and Machu Picchu in a compact route.
products.description: Short Inca Trail version that connects trekking, history and Machu Picchu in a compact route.

permits.type: Camino Inca / Red de Caminos Inca
permits.notes: Subject to official availability and complete traveler details.

accommodationType: camping or accommodation according to the confirmed operation
products.season: Year-round, subject to weather and availability

availability.notes: Confirm availability before charging the booking.

operationalNotes: A basic fitness assessment is recommended.
The itinerary and campsites may vary due to weather, permits or local regulations.
Final prices will be confirmed according to travel date, group size and included services.

seo.title: Camino Inca 2D/1N | My Cusco Trip
seo.description: Short Inca Trail version that connects trekking, history and Machu Picchu in a compact route.

faq.q: How long does the experience last?
faq.a: The reference duration is 2D/1N. The final schedule is coordinated before departure so you clearly know the pickup, visits and return time.

faq.q: Does the tour include a guide?
faq.a: Yes. All our tours include a professional guide in Spanish and English. Other languages are available upon request/coordination and may have an additional cost.

faq.q: Which tickets or extras should I consider?
faq.a: If a special entrance ticket applies for your date, the reservations team will review it with you before payment.

faq.q: Where does the service start?
faq.a: Pickup or the meeting point is coordinated according to the tour, your hotel and the operation of the day. We send the final details by WhatsApp or email before the experience.

faq.q: What should I bring?
faq.a: We recommend bringing your passport or ID, water, sun protection, comfortable clothes, a light jacket and cash for personal expenses or tickets not included.
